creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
I still have the very same issue as reported initially. I couldn't get much closer to the problem, but stepped over the error in the debug log shown below (OpenLDAP 2.4 backend, latest www/netxcloud as 23.0.2.1, it occurs only the very first time I try to login, so I guess it is hidden by caching of the login process.

Since I didn't change anything in the configuration, neither on the nexcloud side, nor on OpenLDAP server/client, something seems to be broken since PHP80 then (php74 works on all other platforms so far).
The same OpenLDAP backend is used to autheticate users for Apache and  that works very well, so far.

Hopefully someone can see something in the log portion below I can't and have some suggestions/ideas what could cause the problem.



[...]
